mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods_comment (goods_id, user_id, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, content, rating, status, create_time) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{content}, #{rating}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.goods_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.content, c.rating, c.status, c.create_time, u.username, u.icon AS user_icon FROM goods_comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.goods_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.content, c.rating, c.status, c.create_time, u.username, u.icon AS user_icon, ru.username AS reply_to_username FROM goods_comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `user` ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.goods_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.content, c.rating, c.status, c.create_time, u.username, u.icon AS user_icon, ru.username AS reply_to_username FROM goods_comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `user` ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.goods_id = #{goodsId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.goods_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.content, c.rating, c.status, c.create_time, u.username, u.icon AS user_icon FROM goods_comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM goods_comment WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 0
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM goods_comment WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 0 AND rating IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE goods_comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
